close_reason: Two functions have different error handling and different SDK calls. Not worth abstracting.
description: src/lib.rs:238-256 (resolve_project_id) and 259-275 (resolve_secret_id) follow the same shape: list, find by string field, map to id, ok_or NotFound. The Bitwarden request and response types differ (ProjectsListRequest+ProjectResponse vs SecretIdentifiersByProjectRequest+SecretIdentifierResponse), and the matched field is different (.name vs .key), so a generic helper would need a trait or a closure pair. The current duplicated form is two ~10-line functions; a generic version would be ~15 lines with a trait bound. Probably not worth the abstraction tax for two call sites. Filed as opinion. If a third 'resolve X by name' helper appears, revisit and abstract then.
title: resolve_project_id and resolve_secret_id duplicate list-and-find pattern
